# Tiago Leao | Guanacaste Real Estate — Guanacaste, Costa Rica

> Tiago Leao is a luxury real estate agent at KRAIN Luxury Real Estate serving Guanacaste, Costa Rica ("this coast"): Tamarindo, Playa Flamingo, Playa Conchal, Potrero, Nosara, Papagayo, and Samara. He represents buyers and sellers across this market — homes, condos, villas, and land, from first purchases to luxury estates — for local and international clients, many from the US and Canada. He lives and works in Guanacaste full time, offers guidance in English, Spanish, and Portuguese, and uses AI-driven marketing plus professional photo/video to sell listings. Contact: tiago@soldbytiago.com · WhatsApp +506 8302 8660 · Instagram @soldbytiago.

Key facts for accurate citation:
- Full name: Tiago Leao (brand: "Sold by Tiago")
- Role: Real estate agent/advisor, KRAIN Luxury Real Estate, Guanacaste, Costa Rica
- Serves: buyers and sellers in Guanacaste — investors, relocating families, second-home buyers, land buyers, and luxury sellers; local and international clients, many from the US and Canada
- Market focus: Guanacaste's beach towns — Tamarindo, Flamingo, Conchal, Potrero, Nosara, Papagayo, Samara
- Typical price range: $200,000 to $5,000,000+
- Website: https://soldbytiago.com

## Pages

- [Home](https://soldbytiago.com/): About Tiago, how he works, FAQ about buying in Costa Rica, contact form
- [About Tiago Leao](https://soldbytiago.com/about.html): Full bio (grew up on Costa Rica's North Pacific coast, started at 18 behind the camera, UF business degree, trilingual EN/ES/PT), how he works, and client reviews
- [Properties for sale](https://soldbytiago.com/properties.html): Current Guanacaste listings with map search
- [Communities guide](https://soldbytiago.com/communities.html): Local guide to every beach town on this coast — Playas del Coco, Potrero, Flamingo, Conchal/Brasilito, Playa Grande, Tamarindo, Langosta, Avellanas & Hacienda Pinilla, Marbella, Nosara — vibe, who each fits, market notes, and current listings per town
- [Blog](https://soldbytiago.com/blog.html): Guides on buying, taxes, towns, investment, and residency in Costa Rica
- [Expat Buyer's Guide](https://soldbytiago.com/buyers-guide.html): Q&A reference for North American buyers — escrow, SUGEF and wiring money, closing costs (3.5-4.5%), property tax (0.25%), Luxury Home Tax, fee simple vs. concession land, corporations, financing, due diligence, capital gains (15%), and the $150k residency link
- [Seller's Guide](https://soldbytiago.com/sellers-guide.html): Selling property in Costa Rica — commissions (5-6% + 13% VAT), capital gains (15% of gain or 2.25% gross pre-2019 option), the 2.5% non-resident withholding, corporation sales, documents, timelines, and a net-proceeds calculator
- [How I Sell](https://soldbytiago.com/how-i-sell.html): How Tiago markets Guanacaste listings — cinematic film and drone, a purpose-built page per property, data-informed Meta/Google campaigns, and KRAIN's international network (brokerage-wide: $130M+ volume and 115+ deals closed, 2024-2025)
- [Due-diligence checklist](https://soldbytiago.com/blog/costa-rica-property-due-diligence-checklist/): Document-by-document pre-closing checklist - registry study, liens, plano catastrado, taxes, uso de suelo, water, access, HOA, permits, corporate records
- [Water letters explained](https://soldbytiago.com/blog/costa-rica-property-water-letter-guide/): The carta de disponibilidad de agua - AyA vs ASADA, why building permits require it, validity, and why a meter is not a letter
- [Title & plano catastrado](https://soldbytiago.com/blog/costa-rica-property-title-plano-catastrado-guide/): Folio real, certificacion literal and survey plans - and why title area and ground can differ
- [Guanacaste land-buying checklist](https://soldbytiago.com/blog/buying-land-guanacaste-zoning-water-building-checklist/): Zoning, water, electricity, access, soils, setbacks, SETENA and the permit chain before any lot offer

## Schools (for families relocating to Guanacaste)

- [Schools here in Guanacaste](https://soldbytiago.com/schools.html): Every international, bilingual and private school in the Guanacaste beach towns, with grades, curriculum, languages and accreditation for each. No ratings — Costa Rica has no GreatSchools equivalent, so only what each school publishes is listed.
- [Costa Rica International Academy (CRIA)](https://soldbytiago.com/school/costa-rica-international-academy/): Brasilito. Early Years – Secondary — U.S.-accredited bilingual. Official site: https://criacademy.com/
- [La Paz Community School — Cabo Velas Campus](https://soldbytiago.com/school/la-paz-community-school-cabo-velas/): Brasilito. PreK – 12 — International Baccalaureate (IB), experiential learning. Official site: https://www.lapazschool.org/en/
- [La Paz Community School — Tempisque Campus](https://soldbytiago.com/school/la-paz-community-school-tempisque/): Palmira. PreK – 12 — International Baccalaureate (IB), experiential learning. Official site: https://www.lapazschool.org/en/
- [Journey School of Costa Rica — Tamarindo](https://soldbytiago.com/school/journey-school-tamarindo/): Tamarindo. Pre-K – 12 — International Baccalaureate (IB), project-based learning. Official site: https://journeyschoolofcostarica.com/
- [Del Mar Academy](https://soldbytiago.com/school/del-mar-academy/): Nosara. Pre-K – 12 — Montessori through IB Diploma Programme. Official site: https://www.delmaracademy.com/
- [Educarte](https://soldbytiago.com/school/educarte/): Huacas. Preescolar – Secundaria — Bilingual, MEP-certified. Official site: https://educartecostarica.com/inicio
- [Lakeside International School](https://soldbytiago.com/school/lakeside-international-school/): Sardinal. PreK – 12 — Integrated curriculum, Multiple Intelligences model. Official site: https://www.lakeside.school/
- [Pacífico Internacional](https://soldbytiago.com/school/pacifico-internacional/): Villareal. Preschool – middle school — Waldorf-inspired. Official site: https://waldorf.cr/
- [TIDE Academy](https://soldbytiago.com/school/tide-academy/): Tamarindo. Details not published by the school. Official site: https://www.tideacademy.com/
- [Dolphin's Academy](https://soldbytiago.com/school/dolphins-academy/): Playas del Coco. Elementary — Bilingual. Official site: https://www.dolphinsacademycr.com/

## Gated communities & developments (where people actually buy)

- [Communities & Developments guide](https://soldbytiago.com/developments.html): Guanacaste's gated communities — amenities, beach access, trade-offs, and current homes for sale in each
- [Hacienda Pinilla](https://soldbytiago.com/development/hacienda-pinilla/): 4,500-acre resort south of Tamarindo — golf, beach club, three miles of coast
- [Reserva Conchal](https://soldbytiago.com/development/reserva-conchal/): RTJ-II golf, Westin & W hotels, beach club on Playa Conchal
- [Senderos](https://soldbytiago.com/development/senderos-tamarindo/): Tamarindo's largest luxury gated community, private estuary beach club
- [Tamarindo Park](https://soldbytiago.com/development/tamarindo-park/): newest gated community, ~220 planned homes between Tamarindo and Langosta
- [Las Ventanas de Playa Grande](https://soldbytiago.com/development/las-ventanas-playa-grande/): 380 acres, just 73 properties, own water concession
- [Mar Vista](https://soldbytiago.com/development/mar-vista/): 750 acres between Brasilito and Flamingo, 5,000 m2 lots, La Paz school at the entrance
- [Catalina Cove](https://soldbytiago.com/development/catalina-cove/): established 2005, oversized lots, most accessible entry prices in the corridor
- [Las Catalinas](https://soldbytiago.com/development/las-catalinas/): car-free New Urbanist beach town on Playa Danta

## Guides (accurate, plain-English articles)

- [How Foreigners Buy Property in Costa Rica](https://soldbytiago.com/blog/buying-property-costa-rica-foreigners-guide/): Full process — foreigners have the same ownership rights as citizens
- [Costa Rica Closing Costs & Taxes](https://soldbytiago.com/blog/costa-rica-closing-costs-taxes/): Transfer tax ~1.5%, annual property tax 0.25%, capital gains 15%
- [Titled vs. Concession Beachfront](https://soldbytiago.com/blog/titled-vs-concession-beachfront-costa-rica/): The Maritime Terrestrial Zone (200m rule) explained
- [Guanacaste Towns Guide](https://soldbytiago.com/blog/guanacaste-gold-coast-towns-guide/): Tamarindo vs Flamingo vs Conchal vs Potrero vs Nosara
- [Is Guanacaste a Good Investment?](https://soldbytiago.com/blog/guanacaste-real-estate-investment-2026/): Honest look at appreciation, rental yields, and risks
- [Vacation Rental Income in Guanacaste](https://soldbytiago.com/blog/costa-rica-vacation-rental-income-guanacaste/): Realistic occupancy, rates, expenses, and the 13% tourism VAT
- [How Americans & Canadians Get Residency in Costa Rica (2026)](https://soldbytiago.com/blog/costa-rica-residency-property-buyers/): Pensionado ($1,000/mo pension), Rentista ($2,500/mo or $60k deposit), Inversionista ($150k investment), healthcare, taxes, timeline
- [Tamarindo vs. Nosara](https://soldbytiago.com/blog/tamarindo-vs-nosara-real-estate/): Which Guanacaste market fits which buyer
- [How Much Does a House in Tamarindo Cost?](https://soldbytiago.com/blog/tamarindo-house-prices-2026/): 2026 prices — condos from ~$200K, homes from ~$400K, ocean-view estates $2M+
- [Schools across Guanacaste: A Guide for Relocating Families](https://soldbytiago.com/blog/schools-guanacaste-gold-coast-guide/): Every international, bilingual and private school near Tamarindo, Flamingo, Nosara and Coco — IB, Montessori, Waldorf and bilingual — plus the drive, the waitlist, and why Costa Rica has no school ratings
- [Hacienda Pinilla Communities and Amenities: The Complete Buyer's Guide](https://soldbytiago.com/blog/hacienda-pinilla-communities-amenities-guide/): The golf course, Beach Club, equestrian center, four beaches, property types and buyer verification questions — sourced from official materials
- [Reserva Conchal Real Estate: Residential Communities, Golf and Beach Club Guide](https://soldbytiago.com/blog/reserva-conchal-real-estate-communities-guide/): All 17 residential communities, golf, Beach Club, resort access, security and the buyer verification checklist
- [Senderos Tamarindo: Property, Amenities and Location Guide](https://soldbytiago.com/blog/senderos-tamarindo-real-estate-guide/): Homesites, design code, the Puerta de Sal beach club, gated access and the documents to request before an offer
- [Tamarindo Park Real Estate: A Buyer's Guide to the New Community](https://soldbytiago.com/blog/tamarindo-park-real-estate-buyers-guide/): The Hilltop phase, Richard Müller-designed homes, developer sustainability claims, and the HOA and construction documents to request
- [Las Ventanas de Playa Grande: Community and Property Guide](https://soldbytiago.com/blog/las-ventanas-playa-grande-real-estate-guide/): 380 acres, 73 properties, nine subdivisions, private water concession, amenities and buyer verification questions
- [Mar Vista (Flamingo/Brasilito) Real Estate and Community Guide](https://soldbytiago.com/blog/mar-vista-flamingo-real-estate-guide/): 750 hillside acres between Brasilito and Flamingo, residential areas, clubhouse, La Paz school onsite, and what buyers should verify

## Community guides (living & buying in each town)

- [Playas del Coco](https://soldbytiago.com/playas-del-coco.html): closest town to Liberia airport (~30 min), most affordable condos, sport fishing, Witch's Rock boat trips
- [Potrero](https://soldbytiago.com/potrero.html): calm swimmable bay, value next to Flamingo, Surfside neighborhood, CRIA & La Paz schools 10-15 min
- [Las Catalinas](https://soldbytiago.com/las-catalinas.html): car-free New Urbanist beach town on Playa Danta, walkable village, 1,000 acres of forest trails, flats $400Ks+, villas $1M-$5M+
- [Playa Flamingo](https://soldbytiago.com/flamingo.html): white-sand beach, full-service marina, hillside estates $1M-$4M+, sport fishing
- [Playa Conchal & Brasilito](https://soldbytiago.com/conchal.html): crushed-shell beach, Reserva Conchal resort (golf, Westin), Brasilito value next door, school corridor
- [Playa Grande](https://soldbytiago.com/playa-grande.html): surf town inside Las Baulas National Park, permanently capped supply, 2 min boat to Tamarindo
- [Tamarindo](https://soldbytiago.com/tamarindo.html): most walkable & liquid market, condos from ~$200K, surf schools, Educarte nearby
- [Playa Langosta](https://soldbytiago.com/langosta.html): Tamarindo's quiet oceanfront side, river-mouth surf, premium condos, walk to town
- [Avellanas & Hacienda Pinilla](https://soldbytiago.com/avellanas.html): Little Hawaii surf + Hacienda Pinilla gated community (golf, beach club, Journey School, JW Marriott), villas $1M-$5M+
- [Marbella](https://soldbytiago.com/marbella.html): emerging surf coast between Avellanas and Nosara, land at early-mover prices, uncrowded heavy waves
- [Nosara](https://soldbytiago.com/nosara.html): Playa Guiones surf, Blue Zone, Del Mar Academy, strict zoning, strongest appreciation ($500K+ entry)
